sprint: v75.70 Sprint 7.25 — Experiência Arena. Sons via Web Audio API (sem MP3): playVenda (4 notas crescentes), playAlerta, playNotif, playCheckin, playError. Toggle 🔊/🔇 no header com localStorage.
